creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Hi,
I can't reproduce this problem on the official 9.1-RELEASE on amd64:

[root@dev]~# uname -a
FreeBSD dev.bsdrp.net 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE #0 r243825: Tue
Dec  4 09:23:10 UTC 2012
root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
[root@dev]~# kldload if_carp
[root@dev]~# kldstat -n if_carp
Id Refs Address            Size     Name
 4    1 0xffffffff8163e000 4d3d     if_carp.ko

Regards,

Olivier
